feed.title: SAP Community - SD (Sales and Distribution)
feed.subtitle: SD (Sales and Distribution) Q&A in SAP Community

entry.title: Delivery Relevant Sales Items with Billing Plan
entry.content:
I am looking for a solution to this:

Customer orders x 10 of an item at £150.00 each.

No set delivery date. Customer will advise as and when they are to be delivered this year (when needed). They will be dispatched via standard delivery processes.

But billing will not be delivery related. Customer will be billed as per scheduled billing plan of £125 last day of each month.

How can I apply a billing plan to delivery relevant sales line?

My billing plans currently do not use Order Quantity so whilst the billing works, I have not way  to manage delivery.

entry.title: Multi currency for a customer
entry.content:
Hi ,

Please let me know if we can maintain Multiple Currency for a Single Customer.

Same customer biils in different currency

 

Rg

Siva

entry.title: Is it possible to change the name of performa invoice ?
entry.content:
Hi All,

we have a scenario in which we have to create a delivery in advance to print out the documents for custom clearance. My question is that we are going to create a perform invoice  against a delivery since at the time of documenatation we will not do a goods issue. Is it possible and Ok from process point of view to rename the performa invoice to an actual invoice so to get a custom clearnace? as for custom clearance cannot be done on a document with a header "Performa".

entry.title: Partial goods issue in S4HANA (non-cloud)
entry.content:
Hi All,

I have a delivery where I have to pick 20 Kgs, for some reason 10 Kgs are missing due to late production.

Can I do a partial goods issue for 10 kgs ? or I need to adjust the qty of delivery to 10 and do a goods issue for a complete delivery and create a new one for the pending quantity? 

Please suggest, can we do a partial goods issue in SAP standard S4HANA?

entry.title: In SAP suddenly for all the customers are started to get the old invoice documents via email
entry.content: In SAP suddenly for all the customers are started to get the old past 3 years old billing invoice documents via email.

entry.title: Error loading the sales orders file using the Import Sales Orders tile
entry.content:
when I load the attached file with the Import sales orders tile, SAP displays the following error message:
Your file contains missing, invalid, or duplicate data. Number of messages: 2.

Error :

Sales order 141: Item ID 10 exists more than once.
Sheet "Order Data", rows 34 and 254
----> Sales order 141: Item ID 10 exists more than once.
Row 254 not uploaded

Sales order 151: Item ID 10 exists more than once.
Sheet "Order Data", rows 48 and 264
---->Sales order 151: Item ID 10 exists more than once.
Row 264 not uploaded

 

When I separate the lines linked to the Sales Order (Temporary ID): 141 & 151 in another file--> the two sales orders are created correctly.

I have compared lines 34 and 254 as well as 48 and 264 and I have not identified any relationship or data duplication.
Could you please tell us why this is happening? Our users do not understand this error and do not wish to separate the lines into other files as this requires them to spend additional time analysing and working, bearing in mind that the files are supplied by another department.

Regards

entry.title: Get PDF Action in Sales Contract API | S4 Output | PDF to external system
entry.content:
Is it possible to enhance the Sales Contract API(SAP Business Accelerator Hub) to include a Get PDF action similar to what is avaialable in the Billing Document API?

Get PDF of Billing Document | SAP Help Portal

We are trying to send the form output generated from the Sales contract to an external system. We are able to easily do it for billing documents since the API has the standard operation for PDF but the same is not available for Sales Contracts.For output management,we are using S4 output.

entry.title: Sales order to sales order copy controls VTAA
entry.content:
As per the business requirement while the creating a sales order with reference to another sales order the request delivery date and pricing date should not be copy from the reference document, it should be the present date.


------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.

entry.title: Flexible Workflow - Agent Determination Rule Failed
entry.content:
Hello!

I have set up the flexible workflow scenario for Sales Orders and I want to use the team Functionality .

I set up the Teams and Responsibilities : 

and the respective sales workflows

My workflows are getting triggered ,but there's no agent determined.

You can see the error below:

Now , it seemed strange to me that the system can't find the agent responsibility rule ,so I digged in and find the standard rule ID for the workflow template

So , my guess is that this rule /FUNC/CMR1LVLA ,cannot be determined.

I used the fiori apps "Manage Responsibility Rules" and "Manage Responsibility Context"

In the first one , there is no /FUNC/CMR1LVLA in the list , which strikes me as unusual.

Also in the second one , there is no agent rule assigned.

So , is there something missing? 

I would expect to see the /FUNC/CMR1LVLA in the Responsibility Rules and Assigned to WS02000006 in the Responsibility Context.

Do I have to "install" these via a note or something?

Also , is there anything else I can check?

entry.title: Material Status Check for BOM main material
entry.content:
Hello Community,

I have a question for Material status in main BOM material.

Main Bom Material has been configured in the material Master with Cross-Plant Material 07 Base Material-no cost

When I create a sales order OR for the BOM main item and the sub items. Order creates successfully. Item cat TAP/TAN. Then I create delivery LF for main and subitems again no issues

 

However, when I create a Lean Return order in reference to the original Invoice F2 Return for the same material, I get the following error:

Material X has status Base Material-no cost in plant X

I was able to change this as a warning in Data Relevant to Sales and Distribution -> Define sales statues. However, when I try to Goods Receipt LR delivery, I get the same message:

Why in the OR sales order dont have any issues but I get the errors on the Return order? 

How I can configure this correctly in the LR delivery so i can do GR?

Thanks

entry.title: Credit block Error - Next Inspection Date and Open items
entry.content:
Dear Friends,

While executing the Sales Order , I am getting the error "Order blocked for delivery as a result of credit check" .

When i check in  program CHECK_CM it shows the following error " Next Inspection Date" . In T.code OVA8, Next review date is 90 days. The Next review date as March 31,2025, it still gives the error.

Also, I am getting the error "Open Items CMPSF = B Not OK". we are in ECC 6.0

Refer to the screenshot.

All the help will be greatly appreciated. 

Regards
Sridhar

entry.title: Unable pass ODN number in reference field in accounting document.
entry.content:
Dear Member ,

we have created condition contract , we have generated settlement document after executing T- code WB2R_SC , credit memo is generated , Now settlement document number is passing as reference number in accounting .

we have to pass OND number in reference number in  accounting document .  

what configuration need to pass ODN number after settlement of condition contract .

Kindly suggest .

Thanks & Regards ,

Shital

entry.title: Handling Import Tariffs on Steel Products in SAP (USA – March 2024)
entry.content:
The U.S. government has announced that new import tariffs on steel products will take effect starting March 12, 2024. Some of the products exported by our company may be affected, and we need to understand how to handle these tariffs within SAP. We're shipping from Germany to a customer in the US. Occasionally, we also ship to one of our own plants in the US. We're not using GTS.

We are looking for best practices or relevant SAP functionalities to manage import duties effectively. Specifically, we would like to know:

  • How to configure import tariffs/customs duties in SAP (e.g., in SAP SD, MM)?
  • Whether there are OSS Notes or SAP recommendations regarding this topic?
  • How similar cases have been handled in S/4HANA?

If anyone has experience dealing with U.S. import duties in SAP, your insights would be greatly appreciated.

Thanks in advance!

entry.title: Pre-delivered templates not available in App ''Maintain Email Templates'
entry.content:
When calling the app 'Maintain Email Templates', in the pre-delivered tab, we cannot find the following templates for the quotation management:

  • New approval request: SD_SLS_QTN_APPROVAL_EMAIL_TMPL
  • Approval reminder: SD_SLS_QTN_DEADLINE_EMAIL_TMPL
  • Document release: SD_SLS_QTN_RELEASE_EMAIL_TMPL
  • Document rejection: SD_SLS_QTN_REJECT_EMAIL_TMPL
  • Document rework request: SD_SLS_QTN_REWORK_EMAIL_TMPL

Is there a way to upload them? Should we create them from scratch via SE80?

entry.title: Unable to create BP
entry.content: Hi,, I cant see my defined value in Grouping while trying to create new BP(org). I have configured the number ranges(account group, and BP group ) and still cant see my grouping value in BP creation window. Can some one please help.

entry.title: Subcontracting to a subcontractor as a production order external operation
entry.content:
Hi All,

I have below scenario in MTO

Sales order is created, from which we have created a production order where we have one production operation ( external ) to send the semi finished material to a subcontractor, where a subcontractor will perform an operation and send that material to a customer directly .

Here ,do we need to maintain subcontractor as a storage location ? And from this operation, do we need to create a purchase requisition , followed by a po to capture the cost ? Will be thankful if someone can shed the light .

entry.title: Missing functionality in SAP note : 955860 - Invoice correction process with return movement (PL&HU)
entry.content:
Hello, 

The SAP Note 955860 cannot be applied in the public cloud environment, as it requires the creation of a new sales document type (RERK), which is not supported.

We are implementing a Public Cloud solution for a company operating in Poland, and therefore this legal requirement must be addressed. Could you provide alternative solutions or recommendations ? 

Thank you in advance,

Regards, 

Eva

entry.title: Custom routine for pricing procedure not performing calculation
entry.content:
Hi everyone, I am doing some experimentation and trying to create a custom routine. I am not familiar with the process and running into some problems at the moment. In my code below, I am trying to give a user a discount if in the current month they have more than 3 orders over the value of 3000. I see some people use "komp" in their code, but what is this and how can it be implemented in my scenario? Can someone please shed some light as to where I am going wrong?

DATA: lv_order_count        TYPE i,
      lv_total_value        TYPE decimal10_2,
      lv_discount           TYPE decimal10_2,
      lv_discounted_value   TYPE decimal10_2,
      lt_vbak               TYPE TABLE OF vbak,
      ls_vbak               TYPE vbak,
      lv_first_day_of_month TYPE sy-datum.

lv_first_day_of_month = sy-datum(6) && '01'.

SELECT * FROM vbak INTO TABLE lt_vbak
   WHERE erdat BETWEEN lv_first_day_of_month AND sy-datum and netwr > 3000 AND kunnr = '1987653'.

lv_order_count = LINES( lt_vbak ).

 LOOP AT lt_vbak INTO ls_vbak.
    IF lv_order_count > 3.
      lv_discount = ls_vbak-netwr * '0.03'.
    ENDIF.
  ENDLOOP.

entry.title: How to include Project System in Make-to-Stock process in Public cloud?
entry.content:
Dear Team,

I hope you are doing well.

I am currently working with a client who wishes to integrate Project System into the Make-to-Stock process. As I have not yet had experience with this specific scenario, I would greatly appreciate your guidance on the process.

Your insights and support would be extremely valuable to me.

Thank you in advance for your help.

Best regards,

entry.title: How to include Project System in Make-to-Stock process in Public cloud system?
entry.content:
Dear Team,

I hope you are doing well.

I am currently working with a client who wishes to integrate Project System into the Make-to-Stock process. As I have not yet had experience with this specific scenario, I would greatly appreciate your guidance on the process.

Your insights and support would be extremely valuable to me.

Thank you in advance for your help.

Best regards,
Souhardhya Sen
